raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "AB 2041 updates California's 30 year old candidate finance policies to better reflect the modern-day political climate.",
    "The bill doubles the lifetime cap on security expenses from $5,000 to $10,000.",
    "AB 2041 extends eligibility for security expenses to include a candidate's or elected official's family and staff.",
    "Nearly two-thirds of women (65.38%) experienced harassment during their campaign, compared to 50% of men.",
    "54.76% of women of color experienced stalking at least once during their campaign.",
    "28.57% of women of color reported experiencing stalking frequently or very frequently during their campaign.",
    "53.33% of LGBTQ+ women experienced stalking during their campaign.",
    "Women candidates experience greater severity of threats and harassment than their male counterparts, especially women of color and Black women candidates."
  ]
}
```
